# Vendored Frontend Assets

These files are intentionally committed so the frontend can run without third-party CDNs.

## Sources

- maplibre-gl 5.19.0
  - https://unpkg.com/maplibre-gl@5.19.0/dist/maplibre-gl.js
  - https://unpkg.com/maplibre-gl@5.19.0/dist/maplibre-gl.css
- ag-grid-community 35.1.0
  - https://unpkg.com/ag-grid-community@35.1.0/dist/ag-grid-community.min.js
  - https://unpkg.com/ag-grid-community@35.1.0/styles/ag-theme-quartz.css

Downloaded on 2026-03-23.
